title: Tyczka Hydrogen Becomes First Company Certified Under the CertifHy EU RFNBO Scheme
content: Tyczka Hydrogen has become the first company certified under the CertifHy EU RFNBO Scheme for its renewable hydrogen trading and distribution activities. The certification, issued by TÃœV SÃœD on 15 April 2025, confirms the companyâ€™s compliance with the EU's Renewable Energy Directive (RED II) for Renewable Fuels of Non-Biological Origin (RFNBOs). This milestone highlights Tyczka Hydrogen's pivotal role in the European hydrogen value chain and underscores its commitment to supporting the transition to a decarbonized economy.
author: Analysts Account
